name: facebook-mcp
description: MCP server for Facebook — 18 semantic tools for news feed, posts, notifications, and navigation

browser.visible: Attach to user's running Chrome via CDP (default)

data.user: Use user's Chrome profile with credentials (default)
data.sandbox: Use a clean browser profile with no stored data

domCharacteristics.selectorStrategy: aria-label > role > text-match > structural. CSS classes score 0.
domCharacteristics.note: Facebook uses hashed/compiled CSS class names that change on every deployment. All selectors use ARIA attributes and text content.

operations.name: search_facebook
operations.description: Search Facebook using the search bar

operations.name: open_composer
operations.description: Open the Create Post composer dialog

operations.name: set_post_text
operations.description: Set text in the post composer dialog

operations.name: navigate_to
operations.description: Navigate to a Facebook section via sidebar

operations.name: get_feed_posts
operations.description: Get visible feed posts with content and metadata

operations.name: like_post
operations.description: Like a post in the feed

operations.name: react_to_post
operations.description: React to a post with a specific reaction

operations.name: comment_on_post
operations.description: Click the comment input on a post

operations.name: open_post_actions
operations.description: Open the three-dot actions menu for a post

operations.name: save_post
operations.description: Save a post to Saved collection

operations.name: hide_post
operations.description: Hide a post from the feed

operations.name: scroll_feed
operations.description: Scroll the news feed up or down
